findings.title: Right-size IaaS
findings.detail: Lift-and-shift Windows VMs target burstable SKUs after 30-day utilization sampling; dev clusters move to Azure Dev/Test pricing.

findings.title: Reserved instances
findings.detail: Steady-state SQL pools and compute clusters plan for one-year reserved instances once baselines stabilize.

findings.title: Retire idle sandboxes
findings.detail: Quarterly automation tags candidate resource groups whose CPU is flat for 60 days for manual sunset review.

findings.title: Lift-shift risk
findings.detail: Some monolith components still assume local disk paths; container migration not yet scheduled.
